'''Moro Three''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Moro system/Legends|Moro system]] where a maintenance [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] serviced the ''[[DR919a]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1stm}}
